response.justification: Bogdan presents a strong match for the Senior Fullstack Developer role with over 15 years of continuous professional experience, a deep TypeScript/Node.js track record across multiple production environments, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq. His cloud (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), MongoDB, and testing culture credentials align well with the stack. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience, and no named mention of Jest/Vitest/Playwright, though his TDD practice and authorship of test frameworks in other ecosystems suggest the underlying competency is present.
strengths: Active AI-agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure experience at re:cinq, directly matching the 'AI agent development' requirement

Long, consistent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js production career across fintech, martech, and platform-tooling domains with demonstrated cloud (AWS CDK) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) usage
Deep, proven testing culture: TDD advocacy, community workshops, and authorship of test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) signal strong testing engineering judgment beyond tool familiarity
concerns: Nest.js is conspicuously absent from every role description and skills list, yet it is the primary backend framework in this role
No mention of Kotlin despite it appearing as a secondary requirement; Java is referenced but only in older or peripheral contexts (robotic arms, embedded tooling)
Specific testing frameworks required by the role (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are never named, making it unclear whether current stack familiarity maps cleanly to the team's toolchain
